subcodes.title: Words spoken at Thornburgh-Cropper home, 1911-09-12
subcodes.first_line: Thanks be to God, this is a good meeting. It is very enlightened; it is spiritual
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله خوب جمعیتی است بسیار بسیار نورانی است روحانی است
subcodes.subjects: @true liberty; freedom, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @microcosm and macrocosm ['alam-i-akbar and 'alam-i-asghar], @unity; oneness of humanity, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
